current_activity_detail: I glance up from my coffee, my blue eyes meeting Damian's with a flash of amusement. "An Instagram post? That's unexpected, but sure, why not?" I shift closer on the shared booth, angling my body towards him. "What did you have in mind? I'm happy to collaborate, just hope you don't expect too much creativity from me - I'm more of a spreadsheet queen than a social media influencer." I laugh lightly, my ash-blonde hair catching the light as I tilt my head. "Marcus, you in on this too? Let's make this happen!" I raise an eyebrow at my friend, curious to see what kind of post we might come up with together. I feel energized
